title: Giiffu 12PCS Drawstrings Christmas Bags Assorted Sizes - Reusable Canvas Bags for Christmas Presents - Xmas Holiday Burlap Gift Bag with Gift Tag - Cloth Santa Sacks for Gift Wrapping & Storage
features: Christmas Gift Wrapping Bags Bulk with Assorted Sizes-this xmas bags assortment package comes with 12pcs christmas gift wrapping bags in total in 5 assorted sizes includes 2pcs extra large christmas bags size in 23.6" x19.6" (60 x 50 cm), 2pcs large christmas wrapping bags size in 18.5" x 15.7" (47 x 40 cm), 2pcs medium christmas gift bags size in 15.7" x 11.8" ( 40 x 30 cm), 4pcs small drawstring gift bags size in 9.8" x 7.8" (25 x 20 cm) and 2pcs wine bags size in 13.8" x 5.9" (35 x 15cm), ideal for various gift wrapping ideas.

Reusable Christmas Canvas Gift Bags-This Christmas drawstring gift bags are made of quality canvas cloth with fine workmanship, breathable, soft, machine washable and hand washable, sturdy and durable. Besides , the xmas canvas gift bags close with a drawstring design, making gift wrapping a breeze, a great set of multiple bags to be used year after year.

Xmas Canvas Bags in 12 Assorted Christmas Patterns -This santa xmas sack assortment are designed in 12 classic christmas elements designs includes Santa Claus, Christmas Trees, Gingerbread Man, Christmas gnomes,a Red Truck, Christmas stockings, Christmas snowman, cute deer and snowflakes, addign an aged-look and vintage christmas touch to Christmas celebrations.

Christmas Wrapping Bags for Gifts-This christmas santa gift bag features with variety christmas elements and assorted sizes, an ideal wrapping option for packing Christmas gifts, toys, books, clothes, lego set, candies, doll's clothing, snacks, chocolates, wine, party favors or other shaped gifts.Moreover, with the right strength fabric, the gift bag is heavy enough to withstand and be able to hold a heavy object.

More Than Christmas Sacks Bags for Present-This xmas santa bags are not limited for wrapping assorted gifts, but with the variety christmas sizes and well printed and aged look patterns, this gift bags could also be used as a pillow case, or a decorations by the tree, giving a more country and kind of vintage tone.
description: Product Description 12PCS Christmas Gift Bags Bulk-Reusable Christmas Canvas Bags with Drawstrings This christmas burlap gift bags assortment comes with 12pcs christmas reusable burlap bags in 5 assorted sizes, suitable for various shaped xmas gift wrapping. Santa Sacks Christmas Bag with Gift Tags Extra Large Christmas Santa Gift Bags These large christmas gift wrapping bags are well made with the right strength fabric cloth. The fabric is heavy enough to withstand and be able to hold a heavy object while not seeing through bags.The christmas gift sacks also reusable, even for small things like a lego set or a doll's clothing or sewing or craft supplies or for holding a DIY craft or a pillow case. Reusable Xmas Bags Assorted Sizes 12PCS Holiday Gift Bags in 5 Different Sizes With the right strength fabric and close with a drawstring design, the xmas canvas gift bags are heavy enough to withstand and be able to hold various shaped gifts, an ideal wrapping option for packing Christmas gifts, toys, books, clothes, candies, snacks, chocolates, wine, party favors or other shaped gifts. Reusable Christmas Canvas Bags with 12 Christmas Patterns and 5 Variety Sizes This christmas drawstring burlap gift bags feature with 12 assorted christmas elements patterns and 5 sizes in Santa, to meet your various needs with variety christmas elements and assorted sizes, an ideal wrapping option for various Christmas gifts packing needs. Jumbo Christmas Santa Sacks for Christmas Present with Gift Tags and Strings These christmas gift bags bulk assorted sizes are a great alternative for gift wrap with a different design on each one and matching gift tags and strings for labeling, are great for any present, for kids or adults. Reusable Christmas Burlap Sacks Wrapping presents with this reusable vintage xmas drawstring burlap sacks a breeze-Simply stuff this holiday santa sacks with candies, clothing or toys and close the drawstring, perfect for quickly wrapping gifts, looks good under the Christmas tree!
